title: Add cryptocurrency donation option (Solana) to Mission/Contact pages
description:
Add Solana wallet address display to allow crypto donations.

PREREQUISITE: Client must provide written consent to creating a cryptocurrency donation policy before implementation proceeds. This policy should cover:
- Accepted cryptocurrencies (Solana, optionally Ethereum)
- Wallet addresses to be used
- Refund policy
- Tax deductibility disclaimer
- Risk disclosure

See docs/web3-donation-integration-proposal.md for technical details.

Implementation: Display Solana wallet address with copy button and QR code on Mission and Contact pages.

title: Create journal registration form using Netlify patterns
description:
Research findings: Netlify Forms require:
1. Add `data-netlify="true"` to form tag
2. For SPA (client-side JS routing), need hidden static form in index.html for Netlify to detect at build time
3. Use AJAX fetch with proper Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
4. Include hidden input: `<input type="hidden" name="form-name" value="journal-registration" />`

Implementation: Create registration form on Journal page to collect visitor emails for updates/newsletter.

title: Implement user roles system for site administration
description: Research complete. Roles to implement: [member, editor, admin]. Implementation: Create netlify/functions/identity-signup.js to assign these roles on user registration.
